# Bibliotekos

Užkraunamos reikalingos bibliotekos.

```{r Bibliotekos, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Duoemnų paruošimas

Įkeliami duomenys ir sutvarkomi požymių pavadinimai.

```{r Import data, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
data <- read_csv("../datasets/american_bankruptcy.csv") %>% rename(
  "current_assets" = "X1",
  "cost_of_goods_sold" = "X2",
  "loss_of_value" = "X3",
  "EBITDA" = "X4",
  "inventory" = "X5",
  "net_income" = "X6",
  "total_receivables" = "X7",
  "market_value" = "X8",
  "net_sales" = "X9",
  "total_assets" = "X10",
  "total_long_term_debt" = "X11",
  "EBIT" = "X12",
  "gross_profit" = "X13",
  "total_current_liabilities" = "X14",
  "retained_earnings" = "X15",
  "total_revenue" = "X16",
  "total_liabilities" = "X17",
  "total_operating_expenses" = "X18",
)
```
